title: Anaconda
shortSynopsis: A group of friends decides to shoot a remake of their favorite movie in the Amazon rainforest — where a giant serpent with a monster appetite lurks.

title: Untold: The Death & Life of Lamar Odom
shortSynopsis: This documentary traces the life of Lamar Odom, from his rise to NBA fame and marriage to Khloé Kardashian to his near-fatal overdose in a Nevada brothel.

title: The Truth and Tragedy of Moriah Wilson
shortSynopsis: Go beyond the headlines in this documentary about pro cyclist Moriah Wilson's vibrant life, shocking murder and how far her killer went to evade capture.

title: 40 Acres
shortSynopsis: After a plague leaves the world in famine, a former soldier guards her family on their isolated, resource-rich farm as a violent militia closes in.

title: War Machine
shortSynopsis: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
shortSynopsis: After his estranged son gets embroiled in a Nazi plot, self-exiled gangster Tommy Shelby must return to Birmingham to save his family — and his nation.

title: KPop Demon Hunters
shortSynopsis: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

title: Madagascar
shortSynopsis: Four animal friends get a taste of the wild life when they break out of captivity at the Central Park Zoo and wash ashore on the island of Madagascar.

title: Despicable Me 4
shortSynopsis: With the arrival of a new baby, Gru's life is great — until an old rival comes back for revenge and forces Gru to uproot his family and Minions!

title: Let Him Go
shortSynopsis: After their son dies and their daughter-in-law remarries an abusive man, an aging couple must rescue their grandson from his powerful new family.

title: Humint
shortSynopsis: A South Korean agent hunts a drug ring in Russia and goes head-to-head with a North Korean operative — pulling both into peril and tangled secrets.

title: Eat Pray Bark
shortSynopsis: Five dog owners seek help with their naughty pups from a legendary teacher in the mountains — but it's not their furry friends who need to be trained.

title: The Red Line
shortSynopsis: Three women fall prey to a ruthless phone scam. To settle the score, they'll take on the criminal network that stole their money — and their dignity.

title: Mardaani 3
shortSynopsis: Fearless cop Shivani Shivaji Roy returns to hunt down a ruthless criminal network responsible for kidnapping more than 90 girls across the country.

title: The Giant Falls
shortSynopsis: When his long-lost father resurfaces, a tour guide must navigate old wounds and confront a choice that will define both of their futures.

title: The Passion of the Christ
shortSynopsis: Brutality. Suffering. Sacrifice. From betrayal to crucifixion, Jesus Christ's final hours unfold in this intense, emotional biblical epic.

title: SUZUKI=BAKUDAN
shortSynopsis: During routine questioning, a man sends the police searching for answers when his predictions for deadly attacks across Tokyo start to come true.

title: 53 Sundays
shortSynopsis: When three siblings agree to meet and discuss their aging father's future, their reunion spirals into bickering, bantering and reliving old grudges.

title: It Takes a Village
shortSynopsis: When financial trouble forces Halina to call off her wedding, her friends and family decide to hatch a wild plan to bring in tourist money.

title: Dhurandhar
shortSynopsis: In the early 2000s, an undercover operative infiltrates Karachi's underworld, breaking into its inner circle to dismantle a violent nexus from within.

title: XO, Kitty: Season 3
shortSynopsis: With her love life heating up, Kitty’s all set to kick off an iconic senior year. But will secrets, scandals and her own insecurities get in her way?

title: Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen: Season 1
shortSynopsis: A bride has a feeling that something horrifying will happen at her wedding — and the closer to the altar she gets, the worse it becomes.

title: The Predator of Seville: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A sexual assault by a Spanish tour guide sparks a surge of similar claims from multiple US students. This documentary follows their fight for justice.

title: ONE PIECE: Season 2
shortSynopsis: Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates set sail for the legendary Grand Line, encountering wondrous new lands and fresh dangers in their quest for treasure.

title: Love on the Spectrum: Season 4
shortSynopsis: New and familiar faces star in this heartfelt documentary series that follows singles on the autism spectrum as they search for true love.

title: Raw: 2026 - March 30, 2026
shortSynopsis: The Usos throw down with Logan Paul & Austin Theory in a World Tag Team Title Street Fight at Madison Square Garden in New York City.

title: Homicide: New York: Season 2
shortSynopsis: In the city that never sleeps, an elite team of NYPD detectives relive the homicide investigations that defined their careers. These are their stories.

title: Virgin River: Season 7
shortSynopsis: Newly married, Mel and Jack pursue their dream of adopting a baby, while old loves smolder and new threats challenge Virgin River.

title: Beauty in Black: Season 2
shortSynopsis: As she takes the reins of the Bellarie empire, Kimmie confronts a vicious family power struggle, where betrayal, greed and danger lurk at every turn.

title: Ripple: Season 1
shortSynopsis: In New York City, four strangers navigate life's challenges while their separate paths unexpectedly intertwine in ways that change them forever.

title: Detective Hole: Season 1
shortSynopsis: When a series of ritualistic murders hits Oslo, a gifted detective must navigate a puzzle of patterns, corruption and his own demons to catch the killer.

title: Bloodhounds: Season 2
shortSynopsis: Two young boxers gear up for another fight when a global syndicate running an illegal boxing league targets them and puts their loved ones at risk.

title: Radioactive Emergency: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Physicists and doctors race to contain a massive radiological disaster and save thousands of lives in this drama series inspired by true events.

title: Phantom Lawyer: Season 1
shortSynopsis: When he suddenly gains the ability to see ghosts, a quiet lawyer recruits an ambitious rival to help his quirky spectral clients find corporeal justice.

title: Pursuit of Jade: Season 1
shortSynopsis: To protect her family, a commoner marries a fallen nobleman. They fall in love, and she stands by him to fight for their future.

title: Agent from Above: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Bound by a deity's pact, Han Chieh fights demons on Earth. When he uncovers an old enemy's plan for a second invasion, he must fight to save humanity.

title: Sins of Kujo: Season 1
shortSynopsis: From thugs to yakuza, Taiza Kujo wields the law to defend society's worst. Fellow lawyer, Karasuma doubts his ethics but joins him in facing the abyss.

title: Bloodhounds: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Three friends working for a benevolent moneylender band together to take down a ruthless loan shark who preys on the financially desperate.

title: Toriko X One Piece Collaboration Special: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Join Toriko, Luffy, Goku and all their friends in this special crossover series as they team up to hunt and devour legendary ingredients.

title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG
shortSynopsis: BTS makes their monumental return to celebrate the release of their new album with a global live performance from Seoul's historic Gwanghwamun Square.
